_comment: Expected shape of an ext-proc-delegation audit event for a successful delegated tool call.
_comment_placeholders: Values in <ANGLE_BRACKETS> are runtime-generated and will vary per run.
_comment_hash_note: Tool arguments are NEVER logged raw — only sha256(canonical-JSON-args) appears.
trace_id: <W3C trace ID if OTEL propagation is active, else empty string>
span_id: <W3C span ID if OTEL propagation is active, else empty string>

agent.sub: <Vault-issued subject claim for the agent SVID>
